title: HF SAE no-fixed alignment
summary: The current published taxonomy uses Hugging Face response text and Hugging Face SAE latent activations. The promoted canonical method keeps raw activations, transition-filtered phase inference with empirical phase profiles, repair-loopback sentence alignment, and the no-fixed grouping objective.
note: The published explorer displays the last complete 12-group artifact plus the reserved degenerate projection state. The transition-phase pairwise artifact is promoted but still needs regeneration.

rows.label: HF SAE canonical
rows.note: No fixed U1/U7 anchors. Grouping uses the regenerated HF SAE dimensions: 20, 16, 20, 16, and 18 latents across the five models.

rows.label: Semantic evaluation
rows.note: GPT semantic scoring produced combined mean 0.692, harmonic 0.596, consistency 0.708, and orthogonality 0.780.

rows.label: Reserved degenerate projection
rows.note: Rows judged no-information and deterministic obvious template rows are assigned to group -1 during annotation. Only transitions to and from that state are interpreted.
